title: Microsoft Makes History: Delivers Bluetooth Keyboard and Mouse
author: Microsoft Corporation (press release)
abstract: Microsoft press release announcing its Wireless Optical Desktop for Bluetooth, among the first Bluetooth-branded mainstream PC peripherals from a major vendor. Peter Kastner of Aberdeen Group characterizes the launch as the catalyst that finally moves Bluetooth from pre-launch hype into mainstream consumer peripherals.
importance_rationale: Early mainstream-branded Bluetooth peripheral helped legitimize the standard; Kastner provided a quotable market-making analyst narrative.
relevance_rationale: Bluetooth is now ubiquitous; specific product long discontinued. Relevant mainly as market-history anchor.
prescience_rationale: Kastner's 'key catalyst' framing proved accurate; Bluetooth peripherals became mainstream and ubiquitous within 5 years.
